headline: $100M Bitcoin Bond Issuance Rejected in New Hampshire

article.title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
article.summary: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

headline: Backpack Launches 24/7 Tokenized Equity Trading Platform

article.title: Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities
article.summary: The launch comes as tokenized stocks become one of the fastest-growing corners of crypto, with exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading.

article.title: Stocks Eke Out Gains as SK Hynix Rallies in Debut: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks mildly higher in the countdown to the earnings season, with SK Hynix Inc. jumping in its debut and the market parsing the latest geopolitical developments.

headline: SK Hynix Soars 15% on $26.5B US Listing

article.title: SK Hynix Climbs 15% After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
article.summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s American depositary receipts jumped 15% above their offering price, after the South Korean memory chipmaker raised $26.5 billion in the largest-ever US listing by a foreign company.

headline: Circle Gains OCC Nod for $1B Crypto Bank

article.title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

headline: Bitcoin-Backed Credit Launches in Japan This Quarter

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
Metaplanet is taking its Bitcoin strategy beyond treasury accumulation, launching a study to explore tokenized, Bitcoin-backed credit products that could reshape Japan's debt market.

headline: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Task Force Amid 3200 Cuts

article.title: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
article.summary: Asha Sharma will advise the Federal Reserve on AI’s impact on jobs and productivity as Xbox undergoes the biggest restructuring in its history.

headline: CBDC Ban Removed: Bill Heads to Midnight Vote Tonight

article.title: Trump Won't Sign Housing Bill With CBDC Ban—Will It Become Law Tonight Anyway?
article.summary: Unless President Trump vetoes the bill, it will become law at midnight, banning the Federal Reserve from developing a CBDC until 2031.
